name: Eure (France)
description: Per fess: above, a red field with two gold lions passant; below, a blue field strewn with gold fleurs-de-lis charged with a red-and-white gobony bend.
history: The arms join the two gold lions of Normandy with the fleur-de-lis field and gobony bend of the medieval county of Évreux.

features.role: two gold lions of Normandy over fleur-de-lis field with gobony bend of Evreux
